nasb.text: Though I am righteous, my mouth will condemn me; Though I am guiltless, He will declare me guilty.

esv.text: Though I am in the right, my own mouth would condemn me; though I am blameless, he would prove me perverse.

cnv.text: 即使我有理，我的口還是定我有罪； 即使我完全，我的口還是判我乖謬。

ccb.text: 即使我清白无辜，我的口也会认罪； 即使我纯全无过，祂也会判我有罪。
